name: Cortex XSIAM
description: Palo Alto Networks AI-driven security operations platform combining SIEM, SOAR, ASM, and XDR for automated incident management, alert handling, and endpoint response.

actions.name: Get Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve a list of incidents with filtering options.

parameters.name: request_data
parameters.description: Request data with filters, search_from, search_to, and sort.

parameters.name: request_data.filters
parameters.description: Array of filter objects with field, operator, and value.

parameters.name: request_data.sort
parameters.description: Sort object with field and keyword (asc/desc).

actions.name: Get Incident Extra Data
actions.description: Retrieve full incident details including alerts and related data.

parameters.name: request_data.alerts_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return.

actions.name: Update Incident
actions.description: Update incident fields such as status, assignee, or severity.

parameters.name: request_data
parameters.description: Request data with incident_id and update_data.

parameters.name: request_data.update_data
parameters.description: Fields to update (status, assigned_user_mail, severity, etc.).

actions.name: Get Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve all alerts with filtering and pagination.

parameters.name: request_data
parameters.description: Request data with filters and pagination.

actions.name: Insert CEF Alerts
actions.description: Insert new alerts in CEF (Common Event Format).

actions.name: Insert Parsed Alerts
actions.description: Insert new alerts in JSON format with parsed fields.

actions.name: Get Endpoints
actions.description: Retrieve a list of endpoints with filtering.

parameters.name: request_data.filters
parameters.description: Array of filter objects for endpoint selection.

actions.name: Isolate Endpoint
actions.description: Isolate one or more endpoints from the network.

parameters.name: request_data
parameters.description: Request data with endpoint_ids or filters.

parameters.name: request_data.endpoint_id_list
parameters.description: Array of endpoint IDs to isolate.

parameters.name: request_data
parameters.description: Request data with endpoint_ids or filters.

parameters.name: request_data.endpoint_id_list
parameters.description: Array of endpoint IDs to unisolate.

actions.name: Scan Endpoints
actions.description: Initiate a scan on selected endpoints.

parameters.name: request_data
parameters.description: Request data with endpoint_ids or filters.

parameters.name: request_data.endpoint_id_list
parameters.description: Array of endpoint IDs to scan.
